subject: A bare human hand cradling a large faceted red gemstone from below, fingertips curled gently around it, the stone glowing with internal fiery light against a dim rocky background
description: A pale, bare human hand rises from the lower edge of the frame, palm up, fingers curled to cradle a large faceted red gemstone — a ruby-cut stone the size of the palm itself. The gem catches a hot internal light, its facets glowing molten orange and red as if a fire is sealed inside the crystal. The hand's skin is rendered with warm reflected light from the stone, while the surrounding background falls into deep brown and grey shadow — vague suggestions of cavern walls or shadowed stone forms loom out of focus behind the offering. The composition is intimate and votive, framing the gem as something precious, dangerous, and treasured.
foreground: Bare human hand cradling a faceted red gemstone glowing with inner fire
background: Dim cavernous rocky interior in deep brown and grey shadow
emotion: Reverent, careful — the curl of the fingers reads as cradling something precious and slightly dangerous
